summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of Diario di Matteo Ripa storytelling site. Backend: all 5 pytest cases for /api/health, /api/, /api/tts (real generation + cache hit + validation) pass. Frontend: page loads with correct title, hero CTA, 6 nav links, all 6 scenes with audio toggle buttons, Leaflet map with 10 journey stops, archive section with 4 sources + working modal, 36 Jehol veduta grid + modal, 10-event timeline, epilogue with 'Hic jacet corpus' inscription. Audio toggle on scena-1 successfully fires POST /api/tts. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is referenced inside generate_tts() (line 76) but defined later at module level (line 96). Works because reference is resolved at call time, but order is fragile — move logging.basicConfig + getLogger above the route definitions.
server.py: TTS endpoint doesn't enforce a max concurrency / timeout; a slow first OpenAI call (60–80s) will block one worker. Consider returning a 504 timeout guard.
TTS cache key only hashes voice+text; if model/speed change later, stale audio will be served. Include model+speed in the cache key.

Timeline component uses data-testid pattern `timeline-{year}` and JourneyMap uses `stop-{id}-{idx}`. Review request expected `timeline-event-*` and `journey-stop-*`. Functionality works (10 stops, 10 events present) but consider standardising testids for future automation.
seed_data_creation: Generated 2 cached TTS mp3 files in /app/backend/audio_cache during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py is the regression suite. Frontend test data-testids actually used: scene-scena-{1..6}, audio-toggle-scena-{1..6}, leaflet-map, journey-map-section, stop-{id}-{idx}, archive-item-*, archive-modal, archive-modal-close, jehol-view-{1..36}, jehol-modal, timeline-{year}, timeline-section, epilogue-section, hero-cta-begin, main-nav. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://matteo-ripa-diario.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — MVP fully functional.
